title: Application for in-principle approval
text: it has made an application to one or more stock exchanges to seek an in-principle approval for listing of its specified securities on such stock exchanges and has chosen one of them as the designated stock exchange, in terms of Schedule XIX;

source.span_hint: it has made an application

title: Agreement with depository for dematerialisation
text: it has entered into an agreement with a depository for dematerialisation of the specified securities already issued and proposed to be issued;

source.span_hint: it has entered into an agreement

title: Dematerialised form of specified securities held by promoters
text: all its specified securities held by the promoters are in dematerialised form prior to filing of the offer document;

source.span_hint: all its specified securities held by the promoters

title: Fully paid-up or forfeited partly paid-up equity shares
text: all its existing partly paid-up equity shares have either been fully paid-up or have been forfeited;

source.span_hint: all its existing partly paid-up equity shares

title: Firm arrangements for project finance
text: it has made firm arrangements of finance through verifiable means towards seventy five per cent. of the stated means of finance for a specific project proposed to be funded from the issue proceeds, excluding the amount to be raised through the proposed public issue or through existing identifiable internal accruals.

source.span_hint: it has made firm arrangements of finance

title: Limit on general corporate purposes amount
text: The amount for general corporate purposes, as mentioned in objects of the issue in the draft offer document and the offer document shall not exceed twenty five per cent. of the amount being raised by the issuer.

source.span_hint: The amount for general corporate purposes

title: General corporate purposes limit (25%)
text: The amount for general corporate purposes, as mentioned in objects of the issue in the draft offer document and the offer document shall not exceed twenty five per cent. of the amount being raised by the issuer.

source.span_hint: The amount for general corporate purposes

title: General corporate purposes limit (35%)
text: The amount for general corporate purposes, as mentioned in objects of the issue in the draft offer document and the offer document shall not exceed thirty five per cent. of the amount being raised by the issuer.

source.span_hint: The amount for general corporate purposes

title: Unidentified acquisition/investment limit (25%)
text: The amount raised for such objects where the issuer company has not identified acquisition or investment target, as mentioned in objects of the issue in the draft offer document and the offer document shall not exceed twenty five per cent. of the amount being raised by the issuer.

source.span_hint: The amount raised for such objects

title: Offer for sale of government company/statutory authority shares
text: In case of an offer for sale of a government company or statutory authority or corporation or any special purpose vehicle set up and controlled by any one or more of them, which is engaged in the infrastructure sector.

source.span_hint: in case of an offer for sale

title: Equity shares acquired pursuant to High Court scheme
text: If the equity shares offered for sale were acquired pursuant to any scheme approved by a High Court or approved by a tribunal or the Central Government under sections 230 to 234 of Companies Act, 2013, as applicable, in lieu of business and invested capital which had been in existence for a period of more than one year prior to approval of such scheme.

source.span_hint: if the equity shares offered for sale

title: Equity shares issued under bonus issue
text: If the equity shares offered for sale were issued under a bonus issue on securities held for a period of at least one year prior to the filing of the draft offer document with the Board and further subject to the following: (i) such specified securities being issued out of free reserves and share premium existing in the books of account as at the end of the financial year preceding the financial year in which the draft offer document is filed with the Board; and (ii) such equity shares not being issued by utilisation of revaluation reserves or unrealized profits of the issuer.

source.span_hint: if the equity shares offered for sale

title: Promoters' Contribution: Equity or Convertible Securities
text: The promoters shall contribute twenty per cent., as stipulated in sub-regulation (1), either by way of equity shares, including SR equity shares held, if any, or by way of subscription to convertible securities.

source.span_hint: the promoters shall contribute twenty per cent.

title: Promoters' Contribution: Convertible Securities Only if Price Not Predetermined
text: Provided that if the price of the equity shares allotted pursuant to conversion is not pre-determined and not disclosed in the offer document, the promoters shall contribute only by way of subscription to the convertible securities being issued in the public issue and shall undertake in writing to subscribe to the equity shares pursuant to conversion of such securities.

source.span_hint: Provided that if the price of the equity shares

title: Promoters' Contribution: Weighted Average Price for Convertible Securities
text: In case of any issue of convertible securities which are convertible or exchangeable on different dates and if the promoters’ contribution is by way of equity shares (conversion price being pre-determined), such contribution shall not be at a price lower than the weighted average price of the equity share capital arising out of conversion of such securities.

source.span_hint: In case of any issue of convertible securities

title: Promoters' Contribution: Initial Public Offer of Convertible Debt Instruments
text: Subject to the provisions of clause (a) and (b) above, in case of an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments without a prior public issue of equity shares, the promoters shall bring in a contribution of at least twenty per cent. of the project cost in the form of equity shares, subject to contributing at least twenty per cent. of the issue size from their own funds in the form of equity shares.

source.span_hint: Subject to the provisions of clause (a) and (b)

title: Promoters' Contribution: Staged Project Implementation
text: Provided that if the project is to be implemented in stages, the promoters’ contribution shall be with respect to total equity participation till the respective stage vis-à-vis the debt raised or proposed to be raised through the public issue.

source.span_hint: Provided that if the project is to be implemented

title: Promoters' Contribution: Satisfaction of Requirements Prior to Issue Opening
text: The promoters shall satisfy the requirements of this regulation at least one day prior to the date of opening of the issue.

source.span_hint: The promoters shall satisfy the requirements

title: Promoters' Contribution: Escrow Account for Subscription Amounts
text: In case the promoters have to subscribe to equity shares or convertible securities towards minimum promoters’ contribution, the amount of promoters’ contribution shall be kept in an escrow account with a scheduled commercial bank, which shall be released to the issuer along with the release of the issue proceeds.

source.span_hint: In case the promoters have to subscribe

title: Promoters' Contribution: Disclosure of Cash Flow Statement
text: Provided that where the promoters’ contribution has already been brought in and utilised, the issuer shall give the cash flow statement disclosing the use of such funds in the offer document.

source.span_hint: Provided that where the promoters’ contribution

title: Promoters' Contribution: Partial Payment for Large Contributions
text: Provided further that where the minimum promoters’ contribution is more than one hundred crore rupees and the initial public offer is for partly paid shares, the promoters shall bring in at least one hundred crore rupees before the date of opening of the issue and the remaining amount may be brought on a pro-rata basis before the calls are made to the public.

source.span_hint: Provided further that where the minimum promoters’

title: Lock-in for minimum promoters' contribution
text: The specified securities held by the promoters shall be locked-in for a period of eighteen months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer, including contributions made by alternative investment funds or foreign venture capital investors or scheduled commercial banks or public financial institutions or insurance companies registered with Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India or any non-individual public shareholder holding at least five per cent. of the post-issue capital or any entity (individual or non-individual) forming part of promoter group other than the promoter(s).

source.span_hint: minimum promoters’ contribution

title: Lock-in extension for capital expenditure
text: Provided that in case the majority of the issue proceeds excluding the portion of offer for sale is proposed to be utilized for capital expenditure, then the lock-in period shall be three years from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.

source.span_hint: Provided that in case the majority

title: Lock-in for excess promoters' holding
text: Promoters’ holding in excess of minimum promoters’ contribution shall be locked-in for a period of six months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.

source.span_hint: promoters’ holding in excess

title: Lock-in extension for capital expenditure (excess)
text: Provided that in case the majority of the issue proceeds excluding the portion of offer for sale is proposed to be utilized for capital expenditure, then the lock-in period shall be one year from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.

source.span_hint: Provided that in case the majority
